name: Edsel Gomez
abstract: Edsel Gomez (born August 9, 1962) is a Puerto Rican jazz pianist. In 2007, he was nominated for a Grammy Award for the album Cubist Music.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: I had this idea to utilize Don and do some of that Music for Six Musicians. But the players, I wanted to augment it and use Edsel Gomez who was with him,and I had Luisito Quintero and Giovanni Hidalgo... We rehearsed and we played with that group in Montreal.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
